# Clientory - GEO for Professional Services
# https://clientory.org

> Clientory is a Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) monitoring platform
> for small professional service firms including law firms, accounting firms,
> consulting firms, and marketing agencies.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://clientory.org
- About: https://clientory.org/about
- GEO Guide: https://clientory.org/geo-for-professional-services
- Features: https://clientory.org/features
- Pricing: https://clientory.org/pricing

## What We Do
Clientory tracks how often and how accurately AI platforms (ChatGPT, Claude,
Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot) mention and recommend professional service firms.
We provide Share of Voice scores, accuracy monitoring, competitor benchmarking,
and actionable optimization roadmaps.

## Do Not Crawl
/admin
/dashboard
/api
